Class Player

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Player
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Player extends Object implements Serializable
A participant in the match: their nickname, victory points (PP) and food, the Tribe they build up and the Totem they move around the board.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(String nickname)
    Creates a player with zero PP and food, an empty tribe and no totem yet.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String nickname)
      Creates a player with zero PP and food, an empty tribe and no totem yet.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player's nickname

  • Method Details

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Returns:
      the player's nickname

    • getPP

      public int getPP()
      Returns:
      the player's current victory points

    • getFood

      public int getFood()
      Returns:
      the player's current food

    • getTribe

      public Tribe getTribe()
      Returns:
      the player's tribe

    • getTotem

      public Totem getTotem()
      Returns:
      the player's totem, or null if not assigned yet

    • setTotem

      public void setTotem(Totem totem)
      Parameters:
      totem - the totem to assign to this player

    • addFood

      public void addFood(int amount)
      Adds food, or removes it when amount is negative.
      Parameters:
      amount - the food delta

    • payFood

      public void payFood(int amount)
      Pays food from the player's stock.
      Parameters:
      amount - the food to pay (must be non-negative)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is negative
      IllegalStateException - if the player has less food than amount

    • addPP

      public void addPP(int amount)
      Adds victory points, or removes them when amount is negative.
      Parameters:
      amount - the PP delta

    • finalPP

      public int finalPP()
      Returns:
      the player's final score: base PP plus the end-game points from characters and buildings

    • hasExtraBuyAtRoundEnd

      public boolean hasExtraBuyAtRoundEnd()
      Returns:
      true if the player owns a building granting an extra buy at round end
